main.description: A profile-scoped grant earned during this run that persists beyond it (eg. a roguelike meta unlock: a new character, an item added to the pool, an upgrade bought with meta-currency), for use in a play record's `state` array. Distinguished from `games.gamesgamesgamesgames.state.acquisition` by lifetime: acquisitions are run-scoped possession, unlocks outlive the run. Cardinality: keyed — unique per ($type, id); writers upsert by `id`.

id.description: Stable, game-defined identifier for this unlock. Language-independent and consistent across play-throughs & game versions.

name.description: Human-readable display name in the locale active at write time. Optional, but recommended so renderers without a localised mapping of `id` can fall back to displaying this.

unlockedAt.description: Wall-clock time the unlock was earned.

items.description: Game-specific lexicons that can hold additional information about this unlock.
